name: @settinghead/pi-voxlert
description_en: SHODAN, the StarCraft Adjutant, and GLaDOS narrate your pi coding sessions. LLM-generated voice notifications spoken by game characters — know which agent needs you, by ear.
description_zh: SHODAN、星际争霸副官和 GLaDOS 为您的 pi 编码会话配音。由 LLM 生成的游戏角色语音通知 — 通过声音知道哪个代理需要您。
